title: Albertokuntzea vauthieri
intro: There is not enough information in any database to provide a response to the request.
taxonomy: Albertokuntzea vauthieri is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. It is native to Madagascar. The plant is classified as part of the genus Albertokuntzea, which was named in honor of the German botanist Albert Kuntze. Albertokuntzea vauthieri is a member of the order Magnoliales, although some sources may group it in the order Annonales. Further classification details may vary depending on the source.
properties: I couldn't find any reliable information on the therapeutic properties of Albertokuntzea vauthieri.
